comments.businessObjectName: The name of your Workday business object
comments.apiKey: API key for authentication (if using API key auth)
comments.username: Integration user username (if using basic auth)
comments.password: Integration user password (if using basic auth)

comments.port: Port number for the server to listen on

comments.baseUrl: The URL that QR codes will point to (update for production)
comments.errorCorrectionLevel: L, M, Q, or H (higher = more error correction)

comments.retentionDays: Number of days to retain logs

comments.allowedOrigins: Array of allowed origins (* for all, or specific domains)
comments.rateLimit: Rate limiting configuration to prevent abuse
